selections.name: La Barrita
selections.reason: Classy 2yo filly taking on older maidens, strong 3rd on debut at Warwick Farm before tackling Listed company. Hard to beat.

selections.name: Had It All
selections.reason: Resuming after a break, has placed fresh previously and comes off a recent trial win. Major player.

selections.name: Arctic Bright
selections.reason: Consistent performer who boxed on well for 3rd last start over 6 3/4f here. Drawn perfectly.

selections.name: Bottles Of Shells
selections.reason: Resuming, trialled well recently and has shown ability in previous preps. Can figure.

danger_horse.name: Flying Poppi
danger_horse.reason: First starter by Wootton Bassett, trialled okay and could show up on debut.

selections.name: Iconify
selections.reason: Gollan trained, solid 3rd first-up after a long break, fitter now and looks the one to beat.

selections.name: Disparate
selections.reason: Placed 3rd last start at Gold Coast, building fitness and should be in the finish.

selections.name: Parading Gus
selections.reason: Fitter for two runs back, capable of a better showing in this field.

selections.name: Rough Cause
selections.reason: First starter for Gollan, trialled well and commands respect on debut.

danger_horse.name: Bowling Harry
danger_horse.reason: First starter, trialled nicely and drawn well in barrier 2.

selections.name: Duke Of Albemarle
selections.reason: Won well on debut before being tested in G3 company, massive class drop here makes him the top pick.

selections.name: Cool Gent
selections.reason: Broke through for a win last start at Sunshine Coast, hard to fault despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Holy Terror
selections.reason: Solid 2nd on debut at Ipswich, will take improvement from that run.

selections.name: Pinkish Hue
selections.reason: Got off the mark on debut at Toowoomba, has upside and can feature.

danger_horse.name: Sniper Boom
danger_horse.reason: Resuming, placed in Open company last prep and trialled well. Drawn the rail.

selections.name: Glass Of Rose
selections.reason: Drops significantly in grade after tackling LR company, won well prior to that. Class runner.

selections.name: Bollinger Miss
selections.reason: Consistent mare, ready to peak after four runs back.

selections.name: Hellarious
selections.reason: Flying at present with back-to-back wins, cannot be underestimated.

selections.name: Damehood
selections.reason: Fitter for two runs back, capable of bouncing back to her best.

danger_horse.name: Voodoo Lass
danger_horse.reason: Resuming, showed good ability last campaign and has trialled well.

selections.name: Saint Aldwyn
selections.reason: Won well last start at Ipswich, looks to have found his form and can go on with it.

selections.name: Bluepinot
selections.reason: Solid 3rd last start at Gold Coast, rock hard fit and will be in the finish.

selections.name: Liberty Steps
selections.reason: Drops in class after tackling Qlty company, capable of a much better showing.

selections.name: Savaii
selections.reason: Consistent gelding, boxed on well for 2nd last start and should be competitive.

danger_horse.name: Giapponese
danger_horse.reason: Resuming, won first-up last campaign and trialled well recently.

selections.name: Easy Love
selections.reason: Won nicely last start at Ipswich, racing in great heart and can make it back-to-back.

selections.name: Blazing Harry
selections.reason: Solid 4th last start after a win, drawn well and looks a major threat.

selections.name: Wowzino
selections.reason: Boxed on well for 3rd last start, building a nice record and should be right in this.

selections.name: Farnborough
selections.reason: Won well last start at Toowoomba, going well enough to cope with the class rise.

danger_horse.name: He'sgotthesay
danger_horse.reason: Won well two starts back, capable of bouncing back from last start's effort.

selections.name: Ouroboros
selections.reason: Classy gelding dropping back from LR company, 3rd in BM80 prior. The one to beat.

selections.name: Break Free
selections.reason: Consistent mare, 4th last start and 2nd prior, looks a strong chance.

selections.name: First Mission
selections.reason: Solid 2nd last start at Ipswich, racing well and should be in the finish.

selections.name: Scheherazade
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick of wins, up in class but flying at present.

danger_horse.name: Aldolfito
danger_horse.reason: Fitter for two runs back, capable of a much better showing.

selections.name: Thankyou Henry
selections.reason: Solid 3rd first-up, will strip fitter and looks well placed in this field.

selections.name: Financially Famous
selections.reason: Drops significantly in class after tackling Open 3yo company, can bounce back.

selections.name: Petite Palace
selections.reason: Capable mare on her day, fitter now and can improve.

selections.name: Tornado Express
selections.reason: Fitter for two runs back, drops in class and can show up.

danger_horse.name: Excenia
danger_horse.reason: Solid 2nd last start, rock hard fit and should be competitive.
